Package edu.uky.cs.nil.sabre.hg

Class Node

java.lang.Object
edu.uky.cs.nil.sabre.hg.Node
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Direct Known Subclasses:
CostNode, FormulaNode
public abstract class Node extends Object implements Serializable
The parent class of all heuristic graph nodes.
Author:
Stephen G. Ware

    • graph

      public HeuristicGraph graph
      The heuristic graph this node belong to

    • label

      public Logical label
      The logical formula this node represents in the graph

  • Constructor Details

    • Node

      protected Node(HeuristicGraph graph, Logical label)
      Constructs a new node that belongs to a given graph and represents a given logical formula.
      Parameters:
      graph - the graph this node belongs to
      label - the logical formula this node represents

  • Method Details

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • toString

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class Object

    • notify

      protected void notify(Node node, Value value, double cost)
      This method is called when some other node in the graph which is important to this node takes on a new value. This method has a variety of uses depending on the type of node, but it is usually called when this node might need to be updated based on an update to another related node.
      Parameters:
      node - the node which took on a new value
      value - the new value taken on by the node
      cost - the cost of that node taking on that value

    • markForReset

      protected boolean markForReset()
      Adds this node to the the graph's list of nodes that need to be reset when the graph's reset method is called. This method should be called any time a node changes its state from its default state.
      Returns:
      true if this is the first time this node has been marked as needing to be reset, or false otherwise

    • reset

      protected void reset()
      Returns this node to its default state.
